summary: A montage of Fox News and Fox Business interview clips (Sunday Briefing with Linda McMahon, America Right Now, The Faulkner Focus with Karoline Leavitt) about abolishing the Department of Education.
notable_text: A HELPING HAND; MCMAHON: FEDERAL SUPPORT FOR SCHOOLS WILL CONTINUE; TRUMP TO SIGN EO ABOLISHING DEPT OF ED; AMERICA RIGHT NOW
